series_metadata.series_description: Record of training and staff development opportunities completed to include mandatory training as designated by policy. Attendance roster, agenda, curricula, course evaluation/test results and training certificates may be used to document completed training activities.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: If electronically maintained, original files may be destroyed immediately upon placement onto a server or other mechanism for computerized access. Maintain five years, then delete. ; Paper: Maintain five years, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
